_comment: CO2 savings in kg and energy savings in kWh per single item recycled vs. landfill/incineration.

default.impact_text: Recycling this item saves approximately 0.1 kg of CO₂.

plastic_(pet).impact_text: Recycling one PET bottle saves ~0.18 kg CO₂ and 2.6 kWh — enough to charge a smartphone 20 times.

plastic.impact_text: Recycling plastic saves ~0.15 kg CO₂ and 2 kWh of energy per item.

glass.impact_text: Recycling glass saves ~0.3 kg CO₂ and reduces raw material extraction.

aluminum.impact_text: Recycling one aluminum can saves ~9 kg CO₂ and 14 kWh — enough to power a laptop for 7 hours!

metal.impact_text: Recycling metal saves ~1.8 kg CO₂ and 3.5 kWh per item.

cardboard.impact_text: Recycling cardboard saves ~0.7 kg CO₂ and reduces deforestation.

paper.impact_text: Recycling paper saves ~0.5 kg CO₂ and preserves roughly 17 trees per tonne.

organic.impact_text: Composting food waste prevents methane emission from landfill — a potent greenhouse gas.

e-waste.impact_text: Proper e-waste recycling recovers rare metals and prevents toxic substances from entering soil and water.

textile.impact_text: Donating or recycling one kg of clothing saves ~2.1 kg CO₂ compared to landfill.

mixed_waste.impact_text: Try to separate individual materials to maximize environmental benefit.
